_comment: IAM for the Recall QUERY Lambda. Notably it needs NO access to S3 or DynamoDB: everything it returns (answer + citations) is built from Pinecone search-result metadata (documentId, filename, chunkIndex, text) plus the external Gemini/Pinecone/Anthropic APIs. Those external services authenticate with API KEYS stored in the Lambda's environment variables, NOT with IAM. So the query role only needs CloudWatch Logs — attach the AWS-managed 'AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole' and nothing else. This empty-resource custom policy below documents that intent (logs are already covered by the managed policy).
